### Dave Key — 2019-04-14T20:00:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/chemtrails-are-they-real.17645/post-268052>

> [ElectricUniverse said:](/goto/post?id=267930)
>
> Thanks for a great checklist of talking points.
>
> I hope somebody factually squelches the argument that jets are producing these trails from atmospheric water vapor. Let us know the non-political facts about physics characteristics of modern high-bypass turbofan engines. They cannot produce chemtrail clouds in my opinion.

For starters, There is almost zero humidity over 30,000 ft. So if contrails form by condensing high levels of humidity then your main ingredient for condensation is missing. Even if there was 100% humidity water vapor instantly dissipates. Only chemicals form trails that do not dissipate. Air temperature/ humidity are not factors in trail formation or you would see trails at lower elevations and in extreme weather at lower altitudes.

90% of the thrust produced is at the intake. This means the plane is being sucked forward, NOT pushed by high pressure exhaust. All high bypass turbofan jet engines function this way. It's like a propeller engine enclosed by a round cowling or ducting.
By design, most of the air passes through the engine uncombusted as it has not been mixed with fuel. The air is pushed through by the larger-diameter intake fans. The ratio of air to exhaust is way too high for any condensation formation. The turbine engine is smaller in diameter and is the power plant for the high bypass fan blades. Most of the air coming in just blows out the back without having fuel mixed with it. The turbine power plant is also used on helicopters. Have you ever seen contrails from helicopters?

Only a small fraction of the air taken in by a jet is used for combustion and the conditions necessary to form condensation are simply not present.
The output is under very high pressure, way too high for condensation formation. Also, condensation occurs in cold conditions. Jet exhaust is hot. Hot air can hold much more water without producing condensation.

The ratio of air to fuel used in jet engines is as high as possible. The low amount of fuel results in very low amounts of water, much too low for condensation formation.

The only way to form the kind of vapor trails you see above is to aim a fire hose at the intake of a high bypass jet engine and blast water into it. But that would probably also stop combustion and you wouldn't be in the air for very long.
Real vapor trails occur when a plane is pitched. Using heavy flaps creates a vacuum. High relative humidity must be present. You see these trails coming off the wing tips at touchdown, not from the engine. These Trails dissipate quickly only reaching 10 ft or so in length.
Turbojet engines on fighter jets are different there is no high bypass fan. Under VERY rare conditions will you produce condensation Trails by the smaller turbojets and or low bypass jet engines.
The old series 500 Rolls Royce engines sometimes produce short Trails but there's only about fifty in service and most are in service overseas, not North America.

I'm attaching a photo of myself working on the nose of an A6 Intruder. It was on the front page of the base newspaper at NAS Whidbey Island when I was an avionics technician in the Marine Corps.
The second Pic is an A6 when I helped switch motors one day...

""The Swiss filmmaker Matthias Hancke worked on his first documentary OVERCAST for almost seven years. In 2007 he realized for the first time, that the man-made cloud cover was not a natural byproduct from aviation.

Therefore he started his investigation with the intention to finally get a conclusive answer for an ongoing geoengineering program.

Matthias conducted over 40 interviews in 10 different countries and spent 1,000’s of hours on research and investigation to find out more about aerosol spraying and why our public officials are not investigating it.

OVERCAST incorporated both sides of the controversy, the debunkers and established scientists as well as the activists. The film brilliantly shows how the debunkers debunk themselves with their limited argumentation and lack of scientific data.

For the first time in the movement’s history Matthias took samples directly out of the trails back in 2009. This research flight is not in the film but can be seen under the following link:
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z2PaLS8YfUM](https://deref-gmx.net/mail/client/OUQ9pgU5WMU/dereferrer/?redirectUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fderef-gmx.net%2Fmail%2Fclient%2FAFRayIKsgvI%2Fdereferrer%2F%3FredirectUrl%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.youtube.com%252Fwatch%253Fv%253DZ2PaLS8YfUM)

The other two flights are building the red line of the film. After the film was almost completed, a very rare study from the Swiss Federal Institute of Technology came out with some groundbreaking results; unregulated metals of aluminum and barium were found in the jet fuel, as described in many geoengineering patents (e.g. Welsbach, Huko).

OVERCAST is a movie that every activist should watch in order to get the best arguments. Show it to your skeptical and unaware friends to wake them up. It is a film that gives the whole issue and movement the credibility, which is needed in order to stop this crime. OVERCAST has already been shown in over 12 film festivals worldwide."

American theoretical physicist Richard Feynman put it eloquently:

**“Learn from science that you must doubt the experts. As a matter of fact, I can also define science another way: Science is the belief in the ignorance of experts.”
**
Question everything. Remain a healthy skeptic in all things regarding human thought and belief, especially your own.

Then you will be among the very few who have intellectual discrimination about what is real and unreal.

1.  I live in Boston and my understanding is that this time of year, a hot/cold shower is better than an all cold one. I am finding, however, that when I do an alternating hot/cold shower in the morning, I feel pretty depleted afterwards. Whereas when I simply do a cold shower, I feel energized. I'm not sure what to make of that and whether it makes sense just to stick with the cold?

    2\. Jack said that CT needs UV exposure and said that my location was the problem. While I am sure he is right, I'm not able to move anytime soon, so i don't know where that leaves me?? (I get sun every morning - about 15-20 minutes and try to get a walk in mid day). I'm not sure if Jack is saying I should stop CT altogether until I can relocate. I certainly don't want to hurt myself by doing it.

### Jack Kruse — 2016-03-08T06:26:58+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hyopthyroidism-in-pregnancy.17649/post-190384>

What does low Iron mean for the thyroid and the brain of that baby? Iron is critical the forming brain. It makes porphyrins and hemoglobin which bring light to the brain and DHA turns it into a large electric current that retains a massive charge in mitochondria to optimize tissue function. Iron is needs to make T3 which is need to run neurons properly in that brain. Still think staying where you are is even close to a smart decision?

Who will pay the biologic toll? That babies brain. And then the two parents who make the choice to bring it to the world.............

1.  If the brain is in optimal form the things it controls are also working well. The systems inherent design implies **we are only as strong as our weakest link in this blueprint. low iron can be the weakest link in a developing brain because it causes hypothyroidism.**
2.  If the brain is working optimally than it means by definition that inflammation levels are low system wide not just in the brain.
3.  With low levels of inflammation leptin and all the distal hormones in the metabolic chain remain in allostasis without the need for exogenous intervention. This implies that understanding hormone allostasis and function is critical to understanding how to treat illness and disease. This is a major point lacking in modern medicine disease management.
4.  Brain selective nutrients must be in constant supply to maintain optimal brain function. This means 3-5 days per week at least one meal needs to contain a food source that has access to these nutrients. Think [levee one from the Quilt.](https://www.jackkruse.com/the-quilthow-to-beat-agin/#CellularHomeostasis)

Iron is an essential mineral in the heme molecule of hemoglobin and the cytochrome proteins in our mitochondria to make energy and keep them condensed to allow super fast electron tunneling and maintenance of our electric charge and redox potential. Hemoglobin and porphyrins are critical component of the red blood cell that carries oxygen and light in the bloodstream. The brain gets 20-23% of the cardiac output of every heart beat. Oxygen is drawn to the brain because it is paramagnetic and the brain is loaded with mitochondria which draws paramagnetic gases to it. No organ comes close to that consumption because of the shear number of mitochondria in neurons. This means the brain needs to have adequate sources of iron to make sure hemoglobin and oxygen are constantly delivered to the brain to maintain performance. Seafood and animal offal are excellent sources of this nutrient. Moreover iron is better absorbed from fish or meat than other sources by the human gut. People who do not eat enough iron can suffer from iron-deficiency anemia. Worldwide, about 1 billion people have iron-deficiency anemia, and about 2 billion people are deficient in zinc (Muller et al., 2005). Iron also facilitates the conversion or T4 to T3 the active thyroid hormone in the body. This makes it very critical for humans. T3 is needed for neuronal growth. Iron is also vital for temperature control in humans as well because of the effect of T3 on UCP’s. Heat = IR light = mitochondrial condensing of respiratory proteins.........all mission critical in brain construction. Now go back and re read the magic in [Hormone 101 blog now](https://www.jackkruse.com/hormone-cascade-101/)!

In the USA today 20% of women are iron deficient when MD’s check their ferritin levels. Globally, iron deficiency is the major cause of neuro-developmental delay in mal nourished children (Pollitt, 1993) Iron is also a co factor in the receptor of two major brain neurotransmitters, dopamine and GABA and this leads to cognitive decline. Dopamine!!!!!! Ubi 24 = the entire Time series....................The moral of the story...........FIX YOU ENVIRONMENT YESTERDAY.

# Thread: could use some input with EMF discussion
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/could-use-some-input-with-emf-discussion.17650/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 11
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### twilightkid — 2016-03-07T23:40:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/could-use-some-input-with-emf-discussion.17650/post-190364>

Hey guys and gals - I recently had a discussion with some people about a new technology for your ear that I presume will have biologic consequences and received this argument :"Frequency is not how you denote the strength of an electromagnetic field. That unit is called a Tesla. In order for an electromagnetic field to damage a human, it would have to be strong enough to ionize the molecules that it interacts with. This happens at about three hundred teslas. The strongest electromagnetic field ever produced in a laboratory was only about one hundred teslas.
The electromagnetic field induced by an earbud running on a watch battery is measured in the picoteslas. That's a billionth of a telsa. You would have to wear three hundred billion ear buds for the EMF to affect you.
As far as the wireless signal going to the earbud, it's one of a few types: AM, FM, wifi, or bluetooth. All of these are types of radio waves. Radio waves do not interact with living organisms because their wavelength is ten times smaller than the smallest cellular organelle. At this wavelength, only ionizing radiation would pose a threat, and only through indirect means. Radio waves are non ionizing.
The wavelengths that do affect organisms are on the opposite end of the spectrum. Visible light, ultraviolet radiation, x-rays, and gamma rays may be bioaffective at high intensities, because their wavelengths match the sizes of dna, cellular organelles, and complete cells, respectively.
You can learn more by studying the electromagnetic spectrum, resonant frequency, and cellular biology."

Anyone care to dispute or add to this statement. I figured someone here had a better more informed rebuttal than I on the topic.

This was the article.
[The Next Big Tech Revolution Will Be In Your Ear | Co.Design | business + design](http://www.fastcodesign.com/3057483/the-next-big-tech-revolution-will-be-in-your-ear)

### Donna D'Souza — 2016-03-09T03:49:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/donnas-journal.17652/post-190492>

Ok so never having written a journal about my issues before - giving this one a go:

I have several health issues - but mainly my priority is overcoming high blood sugars in the am. I am type 2 diabetic - with hypothyroidism and adrenal exhaustion - due to its overworking to compensate for thyroid not doing its job. I am on desiccated Armour compounding medication for thyroid. I do sup with two sprays of iodine forte in the am . I also take Vit D. I tried doing the leptin reset protocol but am finding it hard to wake up 1/2 earlier to eat 50grms net weight of protein so have been supplementing with protein shake - but find that drives my insulin higher.
I also take bulletproof coffee with butter and brain octane fuel. I cook with VCO only and do indulge occasionally in some dark chocolate and nuts. I need to drop at least 10kgs but at the moment am so tired.
I have ordered the blue glasses to block out the artificial light and they should be delivered soon.
Here's hoping I can get some results from Dr Kruse's protocol.

Woke up at 5:30am and felt like I could have had at least a further 3 hours sleep ..
drank a glass of sole (pink salt in water with a slice of lemon) first thing then had breakfast - same as yesterday - chicken ball soup. Had a shower then ran the cold water only for maybe less than a minute - was so invigorating.. especially for my scalp and face ... felt so alive - I love it!

Will now not eat till dinner -but I do have my bulletproof coffee with me.

Addendum to the last night food intake - I also ate some blueberries with double cream.

I went to bed with a blood sugar reading of 5.6 (100.80) however woke up to 136.80 (7.6) I am not taking any medications and my last AIC was 5.9

I am up for blood test in a fortnight which includes - HbA1C, CRP, Thyroid Functions and Cholestorl .. I also am doing a saliva test for hormones . # Thread: Rise and shine
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/rise-and-shine.17653/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 21
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Blooming Flower — 2016-03-09T07:31:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/rise-and-shine.17653/post-190504>

**Introduction**
Hi Everyone, I am 46 female, married with 3 boys (21,19,12) currently living in Australia - Latitude: 21°09′39″ S, Longitude: 149°03′29″ E, Elevation above sea level: 26 m = 85 ft. Have always lived within a 300km radius of this place. The average winter temp is 14C (57F) and summer is a steamy hot 35c (95F) so not much variance.

I am starting my diary today to look back upon and see my growth and as a way to start opening up. I also look forward to receiving help and recommendations to improve my learning from others.

I am a bit of an upper class Bogan, it has been pointed out to me on several occasions when people first met me they are reminded of Kath and Kim (Aussies will relate).

Have never much liked or eaten seafood; have avoided the sun most of my life…..oh how times are a changing…

GIHA (gee I hate acronyms) and this site is full of them…but I ain’t going anywhere!

I don’t like writing long post (or maybe more reading them…) as have always been a dot point girl…. Sucked in me!

Chose blooming flower as a name cause up till now I have been a shrinking violet… and that ain’t a life worth living!

Thanks to other members for the diary format… I liked it so used it.

**Goals**
Get from current level of understanding (conception) to at least the grade 3 level I have heard Jack refer to that I still don’t understand, then beyond.

Authentic wellness – my idea of optimal - no bullshit lies to self, an open/loving heart, be better every day, stay out of hospitals and medication free, an attractive oozing of confidence, an inner sense of wellness with my inside shining brightly to the outside. From shrinking violet to blooming flower.

A role model for my kids, family, friends…. Live inspired and be inspiring.

Get outdoors, train outdoors, love seafood, move injury and pain free.

**Parents**
Biological Father – met him briefly when I was 26 and didn’t stay in contact. From the little I know and remember he is still alive at 68ish, still works in television for world news, wears glasses and drinks lots of red wine…that’s all I have!

Birth certificate father – from age 8 - 18, violent alcoholic, smoked in house. No contact since then.

Mother – Still alive 68, didn’t believe in breast feeding, suffers from severe asthma and eczema since early childhood. Her mother died at 84 and father died at 34 from a heart condition on the operating table. Heavy smoker from teenager until probably early 40’s. Poor walking mobility, lives only inside on level 3 apartment in Sydney, on the pension with limited money, has no friends she sees or talks to, claims to be the happiest most energetic person alive, and to her credit she is always up and focuses on the positive and is encouraging to take action. Has been working on herself for over 30 years (as we are told constantly) and tells the same story over and over and is now writing her memoir to inspire others…. Has no relationship with any of her grandchildren (or anyone for that matter, only psychics that apparently understand her and support her). One daughter is no longer talking to her. I didn’t talk with her for over 10 years (have been back in contact for over 8 years now) and could easily not again, however I know life is so short and I feel for her and basically bite my tongue as to have a different opinion then her in an argument / loss of contact not worth having, my biggest fear (a part from frogs) is becoming her!

Reason for all of this…do I have mother “ issues”…mmmmm..(think so..). I pull myself up if I begin to judge and change it around to be more grateful but wholly f… it is a challenge.

**Body Composition**
Was always slim and active as a child, started to pile on around 14. Have been on a diet ever since then. Early adult years I swung between size 8 to size 18. Before my 40th birthday I started weigh training in a gym and got in shape, maintained for a bit then went back to skinny fat when I stopped the training. Started back in the gym with heavy weights about 4 years ago and was a strong skinny fat until 3 years ago I started fasting every day and within a month the weight just stripped off me. I have maintained approximately 17% body fat for the past 3 years. It has been the easiest most manageable lifestyle I have ever done…..but I still don’t have that healthy feeling…something is not right…which I think ultimately has led me here!!!! YAY

**Diet**
Can’t really remember what I ate up until the age of 8, but I lived with my grandmother and she was a good cook. After that all I remember eating 80% of it came out of a tin served with bread, milk, cereal and rump steak with plates of lollies once a week(yep I often heard we were lucky with the rump and the lollies were an apology for getting hit around a bit too much).

Basically done them all (high carb, low carb, high protein, no protein, low fat…never high fat except when I wasn’t on a ‘diet’…then it was whatever.. which would have been high bad fat).

I remember at 18 eating nothing but fruit and vegetables (and I am talking mountains of it a day) for 6 weeks, was skinny as then I turned yellow and thought this can’t be all that good.

I just started eating breakfast again after 3 years!!!! and my goal is to have seafood as often as possible, every meal if I have available…I still don’t like it but I do it! I appreciate something has to change in order to get the change I seek…. The more I read, the more it will surely start to make sense why…

**Alcohol**
Can count on one hand the amount of times I have been drunk, never got it! Now would have maybe a mouthful once or twice a year just to see if I like more...

**Water**
Have only drunk tap water until about 8 years ago when we purchased a reverse osmosis filter, only because the tape water was brown. Never really drank enough of the stuff…..ding ding.
And apparently living in Australia the water isn’t worth bottling…don’t understand that one yet, but I have started to purchase Pellegrino at $2 a bottle, can come out of the alcohol budget….but don’t get that it is ok as contains fluoride? Have increased my intake to 3-4 litres a day…mostly from the filter, not the bottle else I would be living on the street.

**Environment**
So always lived around this general area, but not sure of the relevance, we did live in a coal mining town for 20 years and apparently there are black coal deposits under the town. We really don’t get much of a winter (maybe cold for 2-4 weeks), but I have always felt the cold, I am looking for a jumper if it is under 24C /75F…has to mean something, but I don’t know what yet.

**nnEMF**
After the age of about 10, I have always been an indoor creature, was made to not wanted to. At 17 I got a job at the local black coal mine in the office and worked in an office environment for another 28years. Always been surrounded by artificial light, computer or television and microwaved food. Loved it when mobiles come around, but never liked talking on them other than speaker cause the heat burns my ear…I have started to turn wi-fi off at night and not take my phone with me everywhere I go. Have disconnected the clock in the bedroom. We sleep in air-conditioning and a fan as it is soooo hot, and have been known to in winter too for a noise blocker. I purchased an extech electromagnetic field meter…but need to know how to use properly to know what a good and bad reading really is…basically it only registers a reading if you are up close to the object (eg jug or computer) else zero register….more to learn.

Have disconnected our microwave and moved out of the kitchen, haven’t even missed it!

**Exercise**
I am a sitter unless I am at the gym or on my daily walk…this has to change and I am making progress towards…as in get outside more even if to pull weeds, mow the grass. I have given up my gym membership and taking my training outside!!! …. So I am now looking at trees differently…as in could I climb you… and doing my walk in the sun barefoot if not too hot..…. I will take my weights to the park!

**Light**
Have mostly always avoided the sun (until now). For reasons I still don’t get or could articulate to another why I do, I am now sunbaking most days for about 20-30 minutes in the morning fully naked in my back yard. I have purchased some blue light blocking glasses and only have 2 Himalayan salt lamps on at night. I shower at night using an oil lamp for light.

**Circadian Cycle/Sleep**
Was crap for years, waking up many times a night to pee, sometimes unable to get back to sleep. Was sleep deprived for years (21 years ago) with young kids and work. My next aim is to wake feeling refreshed, hence why I stopped fasting and started the Leptin reset.

**Libido**
Sucks, non-existent for most of my life. It could be the fact I still feel like a kid, not a woman at all. I feel so suppressed and always have, I will hide and say nothing, never want to be noticed, never want to be questioned as I wouldn’t know the answer or be able to articulate what I feel. I am on a treadmill going nowhere. Married young to get out of a situation and don’t think I have ever been in love or even know what that means. My husband is a beautiful soul with ugly parts as we all are. What you don’t appreciate depreciates and I haven’t been appreciating him for a long time. I am doing the motion out of obligation nothing else. Sad but true, I so want to feel horny, I have had fleeting moments over the years and it was amazing, but all so brief!

Funny thing is, he has been telling me for years, get outside with nature, be in the sun, eat seafood, go masturbate regularly, sleep naked. I have been the crazy one while he has remained the constant all these years, but I just ain’t attracted to him or anyone…but I really want to be… why live your life missing this experience!

**Stress/Anxiety/Emotion**
Nothing other than the usual stress of being a mother and life’s demands for a working class family. I am sure the suppressed emotions take their toll though, as I struggle to feel.

**Supplements**
Nothing

**Dental**
Lots of teeth removed as a kid due to overcrowding. A mouth full of silver fillings.

**My Current symptoms**
Don’t retain what I read or hear. Literally if I see a word that I don’t know the meaning , I look it up and then I could read the same passage the next day come across that same word and think…I have no idea what that means! I couldn’t explain something to someone that I have read and kinda understand on the blog…makes learning very frustrating!

No drive – as discussed above nor with much else at the moment….

Lump in my lymph node under my left arm. Have had checked and they say all ok nothing to do or worry about as that happens….mmmmm Isn’t left side the feminine side….

Have had gut issues over the years, stomach ulcers, and ongoing constipation.

Also read somewhere that when you have low dopamine or something???, people don’t see you…that is very much me! I am often not seen or heard even if I am not hiding…this then makes me want to hide..…you know talk to someone and they don’t answer, post something and no one replies, the one that doesn’t get invited to the party.. you get the point …I suspect with my symptoms it is still low, but that is ok, cause I am working on getting me some of that! I don’t’ think it is an ego thing, cause there is nothing more sexy than an authentic self-confident person… Plus changes are happening cause I am writing this…

And the last few days I have really noticed I pee all the f’ing time….I counted 5 times to my friends 0 times when we were together…. Can someone point me to where I need to go on this one…electrons, uv, water… I don’t know?

**Changes I have implemented in the last month or so** (even if I don’t know why at this stage!)

Sunbake daily 10-30 min in the morning nude where possible. Look towards the sun

Daily walk 30 minutes barefoot where possible (easy when has been raining and ground not hot)

Started to eat breakfast after 3 years, consisting of 50+ grams of protein – no snacking – didn’t snack anyways. (good for the adrenals??)

Eating seafood (prawns, white fish, salmon, tin tuna, tin oysters, fresh oysters (not many yet), tin sardines) – trying to add some at each meal

Drinking more water, a bottle of two of Pellegrino plus filtered water

Wear blue blockers at night, have ventured into shops with on…this will get better

Lights off at night and use oil lamps

Disconnected and taken microwave away.

Installed blue light filter on computer, phone and table

Training at home or outside – no lights

Started initial stage of CT…dunking face in water

Started to let myself get cold – cold showers, aircon on in car (we are still in summer and hot here!)

Reading the blog outside – is there still benefit to be outside but in shade or under a roof while I do this? cause the sun will burn me to a crisp otherwise.

Optimal Education

Keep reading, listening, watching and witnessing. Implementing what I learn and start a journal…..

### caroline — 2016-03-12T02:46:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/rise-and-shine.17653/post-190688>

Hi Blooming Flower! What a great start you have made!

I have such a similar story ....my hormones were crap. Dr. K. recommends oxy twice a day to access the pharmacy in your brain.
I said "I don't feel like it - no desire at all". JK said " I don't care wether you feel like it or not ....just DO IT"

So - I did! And it works ....along with the leptin reset and all the other stuff you are already doing!

Are you in menopause? You can get a saliva test done thru ZRT labs in the U.S. And see what your hormones are up to.

You may need BHRT.....

Do you know Suzanne Somer's' books? She does a great job of explaining hormones. My favorite is Breakthrough.

I am just south of Sydney.

Btw ....you can get a good imported water from Aldi. It is Italian - in a blue bottle and very reasonable!

### Blooming Flower — 2016-03-14T07:02:43+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/rise-and-shine.17653/post-190800>

Thanks @[caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) ... I can assume what you mean by oxy from your next comment....but can you please spell it out to me so I am not assuming and understand fully the lingo... I did a search and couldn't find anything other than painkiller...lol
Have you done the ZRT labs since you are in Aust...imagine would be expensive? My sister in law apparently has a great hormone doc that she is going to hook me up with. Cheers for the other info will look into it...unfortunately with the water I am about 1000km from the closest Aldi...so pellegrino it is until I source something else.

On another note, last night slept straight from 9.30pm till 5.30am....and woke up feeling half decent! Still catching the sun daily and have been eating breakfast for 2 weeks now with no regrets.

My 12 year old son has been doing the leptin reset rules and has lost 7 kg in 5 weeks....asked him yesterday - have you been hungry since starting? No. Do you feel like you have more energy? Yes. Are you sleeping better? Yes. Any regrets? No. He has followed the rules every day even when he has been to birthday parties and sleep overs. I am so proud of his commitment to himself (he was getting very chubby and constantly seeking out crap..supplied by neighbours, friends and the good intentions...mmm of family as I don't have in house... and always starving....as you can imagine). Hopefully he will be able to maintain his new habits and lifestyle when he is constantly faced with others doing the opposite.

### caroline — 2016-03-14T08:16:22+0200

Hugging, kissing, touching, pets, laughing, dancing, singing etc etc.

Your son sounds like quite a remarkable young man! Does he follow along here at all? Would he start a journal of his own? Do you have the book by John Ott? Health and light. It would be a great read for both of you! Does he have blue blockers?

### Blooming Flower — 2016-03-23T02:10:02+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/rise-and-shine.17653/post-191327>

far from it caroline...don't know how to be authentic......never have been.... so this is me just writing/spewing a capture of where I am atm
ok I got nothing...still feel like I am on a treadmill to nowhere...have for years.... not passionate about much at all, no drive, I read I mostly don't understand
I am full of shit literally...constipated or more correctly no desire to even take a shit...or give a shit...or a holding on to whatever so tightly...a tight arse
I feel I have a knowing but don't know what that is...it gets confused with all the other bs in there..., I feel smart (certainly not academically..nor street..I would be eaten alive.), I feel dumb and boring as bat shit (more shit...), childish, full of fear, skill-less having lived the same year over and over and over and over again...digging 10 000 1 meter holes...no depth, no substance..... a grateful ungrateful most negative positive person.... I judge someone who would die for me as an aimless dart...when that is really me...take action...what fucking action when you got nothing and don't have a burning desire

...lack of sun to the point of avoiding wherever possible, lack of grounding, living inside watching tv and computers, hating on seafood..always having lights on no matter what time of the day...avoiding discipline...sitting...always taking the easy way out...living in my head, going around and round and round and round with the same bs...selfish, a sense of entitlement, a problem with hierarchy and authority, thinking I am better than this person and not worthy of the next, don't ever give me a compliment i wont buy it...would prefer you tell me I am shit (ffs!!!)...life of bad decisions or more lack of decision making...

For the first time it makes the most sense ever why, even if that is someone else's word and knowledge...at the end of the day that is all I have or will even have to base my thinking and decisions on, so I will continue to get outside and seek the sun, I walk barefoot, I force down seafood, I read to start to fill the process of filling the gaping hole , I do shit I have no desire to do, I sit in darkness or wear orange glasses, and from today I drink more water cause I have no where near been having enough..it so is fucking about environment...i am a product of my environment...it was shit so I get shit... I do this hoping to see and feel a difference... so thirsty, it is only mid morning and I have already downed 2L, going now to drink and walk barefoot in the rain

### caroline — 2016-03-23T02:50:20+0200

what makes you think you are so different from millions of others??????

You are already miles ahead of where you were!

Have you read the things in my signature? They are all really important to me .....have a read and pick something for yourself - something to hang your hat on every day as you move forward.

### Blooming Flower — 2016-04-29T01:55:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/rise-and-shine.17653/post-193802>

Doing a quick check in. Have been continuing with my optimal journey cause once you hear this info there is no not doing. Starting to notice changes heading in the right direction (next step is to figure out the lab details to confirm and have more of a knowing...for me and below as you will read).

My 12 year old has reached his goal weight (a loss of 8kg and 8cm around waist) with minimal effort and is maintaining nicely, although he thinks the dark nights is just not "normal" he is slowing coming around.

My 20 year old was back from uni for a weeks break and called me a freak....kinda hurt (for a millisecond), but I know he doesn't know nor wants to a that age, but he will be watching....his girlfriend is half way studying medicine and her father is a doc...so they know everything....hahaha

My 22 year old is in need of serious help (he has been to doc but doesn't share too much of the situation).. he lives 3000km away (Melbourne), sleep is screwed up and has been for years, depressed, uni drop out 3 times, drugs, unable to hold down a job for any period of time, bombarded with blue light and nnEMF, lives on processed food or not much food, claims he has ADHD and chronic fatigue and is taking someone else's medication that is like magic... so he just told me (geez...keep breathing mum).... claims he is coming home in 2 weeks for a few weeks as he is sick of being sick and tired and is wanting our help (just want to get him here...he can be under the thought he will be fixed in a few weeks...I really don't think he thinks that)... so I need to find someone fast....any suggestions for an Australian based person that can help? Initially I will introduce him to light, water and magnetism he hasn't seen them for a long time.... I would also like to mention that this kid is super intelligent (well was...hopefully not too late...) and his potential is mind blowing...if only he could see and feel it...well that is the goal of being optimal isn't it..we are all full of potential! Contact me if you have any recommendations - 0439 789 134

Hubby is on board and making changes too..... he surprises me as his job is far from ideal...works shift-work in an electric shovel for 27 plus years! Yet his sleep is great, he is medication and pain free.... he has always been one with nature and that must be his saving grace!

Stumbled across a company in Aust that does home assessments for EMF, they have a consultant that lives 4 hours away... totally excited to get that check out.

Now out to get the sun and a bit of naked mobility work/flow!

### caroline — 2016-04-30T03:49:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/rise-and-shine.17653/post-193867>

Even without all the deep science ....this all feels so intuitively right ....so just keep doing and reading and learning and be an example of lite and love for your family.

No one likes to be preached at or to. - even if it is done with love.

Take care of you first .....and you will be helping to lead the way to an optimal life.

Don't compromise what you are doing ....even when others are dismissive or challenge you.

You have so much to give.....this is now your job ....be and set an example - and you can't even imagine what will start growing in your magical garden!

You will find peace and so much energy.....and you will share all of this in countless ways you can't even imagine.

I was always so strict about what I needed to do for myself. My dearest friend thought I was a little nuts but respected what i was doing for myself. One day, at my citizenship ceremony I decided to have a lammington ( an Aussie cake). My friend couldn't believe it and it really disappointed her. I will never forget the look on her face.

Of course - it was my choice ....but it was a bad one.

# Thread: Questions to Leptin FAQ
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/questions-to-leptin-faq.17654/>
**Subforum:** Optimal Fitness
**Posts:** 21
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Butters — 2016-03-09T14:49:07+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/questions-to-leptin-faq.17654/post-190517>

I recently read Leptin FAQ again.
Does Jack really recommend 5 times a week exercise with 3 times lifting and 2 times HIIT?

### jackware — 2016-03-10T00:34:49+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-is-it-so-hard.17655/post-190565>

I saw a video with Charlie Munger the other day, where he was explaining his investment philosophy. Basically it's to buy great businesses that have a durable competitive advantage, managed by great people. Then he said it's doesn't take a PhD to be able to do this, and that's probably why most people don't invest the way he does, it's too simple.
I don't understand the need for most of us to worry about esoteric topics of physics and biology and nutrient amounts and vitamins and minerals and all the rest. Just live like a human being evolved to live. That's it. In fact, just as I am finishing writing this I feel a desire to get off this damn computer and go outside. It really is so simple. Adios!

### Jack Kruse — 2016-03-12T04:12:05+0200

### Nittygrittydanny — 2016-03-11T18:25:31+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/kombucha-success.17657/post-190658>

My mom (78yrs old) has been having skin issues for a few months (says she's allergic to the sun, a Dr. told her that 50yrs ago???)

Anyway, I have been giving her about 8-16ozs per day for the past 4 days and the skin issues seem to be clearing up. She had red itchy spots on her arms and her head should be in a Head and Shoulders (American dadruff shampoo) commercial.

She has had 1/2 of her stomach removed as well as her gall bladder. She suffers from what she calls panic attacks daily. takes meds for panic and thyroid (neither helps IMO).

We'll see how well she is in a couple weeks of simple common sense to health approach.

### Jack Kruse — 2016-04-05T06:14:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bio-physics-3-boundaries-do-we-have-any.17663/post-192068>

Can we remove mass from matter? April 2016 says yes..........but what does the modern Standard Model posit?

First of all... they believe 99% of the mass of ordinary matter (stuff that you hold in your hands; actually, the mass of your own hands) is not, I repeat (emphatically) **NOT** due to the Higgs boson. The rest masses of constituent quarks in protons and neutrons amounts to only about 1%; the remaining 99% is due to the binding energy between them. The bonding energy is electrostatic.

Second..............the masses of electrons, which are light particles, are BELIEVED TO be due to the Higgs boson. The masses of neutrinos, which are also light particles, are not, as far as we know. Key Point: WE DONT KNOW.

Quark rest masses are also due to the Higgs boson. Quarks make up protons. So are the rest masses of the W and Z vector bosons (weak force), but the mechanism is completely different.

Third............ "light is both a wave and a particle", to the extent that it is true (it is a gross oversimplification) applies to equally to all elementary particles. Electrons are both waves and particles. Quarks are both waves and particles. And so on. In the best theory that we have, quantum field theory, all elementary "particles" are unit excitations of the corresponding quantum fields.

That being said... if you could turn the Higgs field off, for instance, the result would be very interesting. Quarks and leptons would immediately become massless. However, protons and neutrons would retain 99% of their mass.

Electromagnetism and the weak interaction would become indistinguishable, and the W and the Z bosons would also become massless. However, neutrinos would retain their tiny rest masses. This brings up the thought: might the small scale also have an effect on the Higgs field?

The Stardard model posits that we cannot turn off the Higgs field. A good thing, too, as it would completely change atomic physics; stable isotopes would become unstable and vice versa, chemistry (if it still existed) would be completely different, and so on. All in all, a bad day for anyone in the business of dealing with bio molecules. My bet is the Higgs field also varies with scale and physicist do not yet realize it.

As to the 99% of proton and neutron rest masses........ for that, you'd have to turn off the strong interaction. And if you did that, there'd be no more protons and neutrons. So no atoms either. Forget the periodic table, not even hydrogen would exist. Just a quark "plasma". Now that would be a _really_ bad day for anyone in the neighborhood. Now turning it off.......it one thing......but weakening it just enough to an anti-neutrino could do something to the energy held electrostatically inside the protons is all together another concept.

Hi everyone
I started getting tinnitus after using sublingual pregnenolone at about 13mg twice a day and a small amount of sublingual DHEA (4 mg once a day) for 1.5 months . At one point I did away with the DHEA all together and was using mostly pregnenolone. I had taken a 10 mg oral pregnenolone in past for a while with no issues whatsoever. The reason I am sure its from the pregnenolone is because I could sense the high pitched noise soon after the dose but it would subside. Now its constant and still persists even after stopping the pregnenolone for a month now. Anyone experience this and how to reverse this fast? It seems worse in one ear than other. No signs and symptoms of an ear infection. Is this from the sodium potassium imbalance in endolymph?

So instead of "You are what you eat", it's more like, "You are what you absorb, repel and emit.

The best way to avoid procrastinating is to begin. If you're stuck in your past, you go forward in reverse and nothing changes. We may delay, but time won't. The most pernicious aspect of procrastination is that it can become a habit. A habit institutionalizes us to mediocrity. Action allows us to step out of the crowd of average people. Enter that game and alter the numbers on the scoreboard. Mediocrity is what's left when vision is absent.

Options to consider:
1\. Instead of a cruise, we can organize a get together in/near Playa del Carmen. It can be a two day (or more, depending on interest level) stay, involving short day excursions.
One idea is to rent a large house on airBnB type sites, and split the costs. Some nice properties with good reviews are available at very reasonable prices. Or we can find a hotel where everyone can try to stay. That'll be awesome too!!

2\. Doc mentioned the following dates once: 6/19 to 6/24, and then he mentioned 6/21 another time.

3\. Doc also pointed out that anyone can go, but he may only be able to allocate his valuable time to Quantlet folks. So if you want to go but haven't signed up for your Quantlets, do it now!

# Thread: Staph infection success
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/staph-infection-success.17670/>
**Subforum:** Success Stories
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Simon Wright — 2016-03-14T14:21:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/staph-infection-success.17670/post-190816>

Hi All

I run every morning along the beach with my dogs and this sometimes takes me through rivers. Its rainy season here in at the moment and the rivers here in Bali leave a bit to be desired (polluted).

Anyway i hit my shin and there was small cut and i went running with this cut not thinking too much about it. I noticed last Wednesday my leg was getting infected. I woke Thursday and i could see this infection was taking off.....by thursday arfternoon i could see that it was heading toward Staph ( I have had this 4 times before). By Thrsday evening after work my shin was going a dark purple colour with oozing pus and the heavy red colour around the edges. I had seen this before and got a bit worried.

I went and saw the local doctor and he said i should take antibiotics (oral ceftriaxone). As a rule i dont take oral antibiotics and asked for the injection of this to the site. He didnt have this injectible in his surgery (we are talking a developing world doctor here...that is local to my area). So i sat there and thought about what i would do.

So anyway I took this disinfectant wash he gave me called Oxoferin and some gauze and tape and went home. I then decided to markedly increase my intake of sulfur via homemade suerkraut at every meal, take 2 garlic cloves finely chopped and left for 15 minutes on the chopping board then add to my salad, have 1/2 teaspoon in a 1/2 glass of water of this very sulfurous salt a friend gave me. But the relevance to the group is what i was doing during the middle of the day. I own my own business and can juggle my day about. I have been coming home at midday and having a 20 min ice bath that has 660nm and 620nm led panels above it (not directly at my eyes) and then i go out into the midday sun which at the moment has a UV rating of 12-15 (as per d-minder). I have been doing this a few months to combat a heavy injury i incurred last year (30% of my humerus head was replaced from my hip)

I do front and back naked (in my garden)for 15-20 mins (each side) depending on cloud cover .

On last Friday i also exposed my infected shin to the direct light , and then covered it back up and went back to work. When i awoke on Saturday i noticed it had halted the spread (Usually Staph is voracious so halting it was impressive)

I then CT'd and exposed my shin twice per day on Saturday and Sunday and also exposed my shin (removed all bandages ) to the high UV midday sun.

Today I awoke and the skin has pretty much returned to normal....yes there is still a definite sore but all the infection has cleared up. I admittedly was amazed as I have been through hell with staph infections before and they are usually about 3 weeks battles....and not very pretty.

So the combination of the increased sulfur(via all above mentioned ), the high UV, The CTing, lots of water and being grounded most of the day with heaps of morning sun has help me beat an infection in 4 days which would usually last weeks.

A short note to say thanks to Jack and all here, I dont post so much as am usually run off my feet ....but am lurking sucking up all of this great information. Thank you all!

Simon

### lilly antic — 2016-03-14T17:34:20+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/staph-infection-success.17670/post-190828>

that is awesome, Simon!!!!!
Bacteria cannot survive in UV light, so good move.
I am also using it it for many purposes, only on a smaller scale
3 times so far after long distance traveling I got a fierce cold this winter. Very bad with watering eyes, sore throat etc, whereas the watering of the eyes is the worst and usually required heavy medication in the past.
All three times the cold was completely gone ( like in never existed) after several hours of sunlight. For me and my heavy cold symptoms nothing short of a miracle.
Then this weekend I came back from another long distance trip from NYC (second transcontinental flight this month-too much for me) and on top of the cold I got a fever and flulike symptoms.
Although we had an overcast day, I sat there for hours (with my mouth slightly open, so that light can enter and kill the throat infection)-the cold disappeared the same day completely, the fever was gone the next day. My body still feels beaten up-but another day of light and some seawater CT will surely fix this ....
What can I say.... for me my miracle drug!!!!

### Joe Gavin — 2016-03-14T19:56:07+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/staph-infection-success.17670/post-190840>

Cool stuff. I read that 460-470nm blue light is good for Staph as well. I read a bunch of stuff on pubmed/nih etc.

### Woodstock — 2024-10-10T19:15:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/staph-infection-success.17670/post-340764>

> [Jingpaw said:](/goto/post?id=340757)
>
> Ive had toe fungus for a few years. One toe now looks quite infected, now oozing yellow and the area around the big toe nail is red. astonishingly, no pain. I’m guessing this is potentially an ingrown toenail issue (I can’t see or feel typical pain of an ingrown) that is causing the infection. Anyway, I’m looking for good home Treatment recommendations, it seems pretty urgent now. I’d love to rip off the nail but I don’t think it’s ready to do that! My plan is to soak in Epsom salts and cut away at the nail to see if part of the nail is digging into my skin causing infection. I’m also going to use colloidal silver topically after soaking because tea tree oil is too strong!
> I am in northern latitude at the moment, and there’s very little UVB now, so I’m wondering if Sun is as effective as it would be otherwise. I know getting infected area in Sun is good any time of year, but with UVB near absent I’m wondering if there is something else I can do too.

I have had success applying Thyme essential oil to toenails that had fungus issues. I used Doterra but I would guess any high quality brand would work. Also sunlight of course. If you can wear sandals all the time. with Socks and shoes our feet rarely see the sun, so it makes sense that fungus would grow easily there.

### Anthony Smith — 2024-10-10T19:43:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/staph-infection-success.17670/post-340767>

My wife got a staph infection in the incision after a knee replacement years back. The Dr explained how serious this was and what would happen if the staph got into the joint, the new knee would be removed and she would spend a year in a wheel chair with no knee. He opened the incision and packed it with silver impregnated tape. Staph cleared up very quickly and did not get into the joint.

I actually asked him why all the expensive $300 creams and other treatments for infections when something as inexpensive as silver does the job . . . He looked at me like he had been caught and said “good question”.

### rtd — 2024-10-10T22:00:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/staph-infection-success.17670/post-340778>

> [Jingpaw said:](/goto/post?id=340770)
>
> Wow!! Amazing recovery.
> I’m going for some colloidal silver, thanks! And trying the thyme or oregano too.

My family has been using the following with good outcomes: [https://www.vermontcountrystore.com/personal-care/category/silver-savior](https://www.vermontcountrystore.com/personal-care/category/silver-savior)

### Annelieuk — 2024-10-13T10:51:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/staph-infection-success.17670/post-340918>

> [Jingpaw said:](/goto/post?id=340757)
>
> Ive had toe fungus for a few years. One toe now looks quite infected, now oozing yellow and the area around the big toe nail is red. astonishingly, no pain. I’m guessing this is potentially an ingrown toenail issue (I can’t see or feel typical pain of an ingrown) that is causing the infection. Anyway, I’m looking for good home Treatment recommendations, it seems pretty urgent now. I’d love to rip off the nail but I don’t think it’s ready to do that! My plan is to soak in Epsom salts and cut away at the nail to see if part of the nail is digging into my skin causing infection. I’m also going to use colloidal silver topically after soaking because tea tree oil is too strong!
> I am in northern latitude at the moment, and there’s very little UVB now, so I’m wondering if Sun is as effective as it would be otherwise. I know getting infected area in Sun is good any time of year, but with UVB near absent I’m wondering if there is something else I can do too.

I typically recommend bathing the tow in a bowel of warm water and 2 teaspoons of bicarbonate of soda for 10 mins and then applying iodine and keep it exposed to fresh air. At night put a small amount of bicarb onto the affected area, wrap it in a small bandage and after 2 nights the ingrown toe nail will soften and you can pick it out easily. The iodine works wonders to keep infection at bay.

# Thread: Divorcing time to connect back to your life force.
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/divorcing-time-to-connect-back-to-your-life-force.17674/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2016-03-15T14:52:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/divorcing-time-to-connect-back-to-your-life-force.17674/post-190879>

A book, your ideas, your childhood are all places were we can get outside of time. It is where you first existed, hearing the sounds of silence in your mind without any time scale confining you. Within these hours, we retreat into a moratorium, they become the last form of private and silent human activity that isn't considered pathological, because we are outside of the moment. Standing barefoot outdoors in the cold being kissed by the sun, today maybe asking for trouble in society. But it is also a opportunity to connect strangers back to nature in an uncommon way. When older humans, who are confined by the time they now live, and they see you connected to the sun and Earth, our small "odd actions" may begin a conversation with them. You become able to connect them to a timescale they left as a child. Their face lights up, and their words reflect ideas filled with surprise, curiosity, and sheer joy. Your current barefoot sun drenched connection reminds them of a past. A past where the cool morning dew on their feet, while running in the sun, was a world they loved. We can watch their body language change, as they reminisce in deep thought of their own youth running around playing barefoot without a care in the world. It happened snow, rain or shine, dusting off visions of a long lost world flashing before them. In this moment, we have helped them divorce their current version of time from their life, in a moment. That glimmer of recaptured joy in their eyes and voice, is palpable. The conversation becomes atemporal for them. Nature is capable of reconnecting us to people and to our true umbilical cord if we allow it. Connect today. (hat tip to Joe B for the inspiration)

# Thread: IF and CT synergy?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/if-and-ct-synergy.17677/>
**Subforum:** Cold Thermogenesis
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Scompy — 2016-03-15T20:09:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/if-and-ct-synergy.17677/post-190901>

As one of my personal N=1 biohacks, I'm wondering if I've stumbled upon an interesting CT synergy if this has yet to be mentioned. As many of you know, I've been testing various forms of IF (Intermittent Fasting) for the past 5+ years and been doing ketosis for 3+ years and only recently eating seasonally.

When I originally lost a good chunk of my bodyfat from 225-->170 lbs. 4 years ago, it helpep when I implemented a normal daily 18 hour fast. At that time, I had my eating window from 8am into early afternoon, typically stopping in the 2-3pm window. I.e., a huge breakfast and a moderate late lunch. Note at that time, I wasn't getting morning sunlight although I did figure out on my own that I needed high protein breakfast each morning.

Long story short, I've tried the gambit of various IF influences trying various windows in the day and even last month doing a morning meal, skip lunh, dinner meal trial. I was reminded about two things recently:
1\. My mother (before she passed) always slept with the windows open to make her room an icebox
2\. My 8am to 3pm past IF, it caused my body to 'cool' at night, remember wearing heavy socks to sleep, etc.

Aside from the HGH and longer falloffs of blood insulin/leptin level benefits with a 16 to 18 hour daily fast, I am now focusing upon the body's thermal influences: the body's low-thermal timing exactly at night while I sleep and ketosis is strongest. At the tail-end of the Intermittent Fast (around the 17 hour window) converts to around 5am in the morning when the home is at the coldest (~60F) during my sleep. I also have not been using the **Fournier Effect** too much, but now plan on doing it a bit more in the coming days. (Btw, I don't have a magnetico, but I'm about 6 feet from the earth and I shut off all electrics at the circuit breaker each night and tested for electrical and magnetic EMF to verify I'm not getting any).

**5 Day Current Results**: On my fifth day trying this eating window again, I've noticed far more coldness at night again (like the old days). I believe this has really ratched up my ketosis and caused the morning breath to kick in. The quality of the ketosis is amplified so I'm monitoring it and blood sugars. I use my jeans-tugness at my best measure of if I'm losing fat from my inner thighs or not. Just 5 days later, it has loosened so that there's no tugging again. From last week, I'm already 6 pounds down on the scale. I haven't changed my eating or exercise patterns. Was floored to see this influence so fast and dramatic.

**My takeaway:** I'm loosely hypothesizing (other factors may be at work) that because my last meal is around 2-3pm, by 10pm when I go to sleep, the thermal influence isn't driving up warmer-signals to the body, but putting me into a mini-hibernation each night when the fat-burning is at its maximum, and possibly mechanisms around removing white fat (and possibly creating brown fat) is strengthened due to a better CT influence.

With all that said, I'm a happy camper because I have so much direct control over the fat on my body when I want to adjust it. I often get around 30mins of CT in the morning driving to work with windows down (45F) and also a cold shower every other day or so at this time. I'm going to be cranking up the CT back to baths as the temperature increases into the summer.

### Jack Kruse — 2016-03-15T20:21:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/if-and-ct-synergy.17677/post-190905>

The cooler the surface the more UV you absorb and the more heat your mitochondria release to condense the respiratory proteins to control local geometry. This is controlled on a macroscopic level by dopamine and melatonin cycles. Time 9.

### Scompy — 2016-03-15T20:39:14+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/if-and-ct-synergy.17677/post-190914>

> [Jack Kruse said:](/goto/post?id=190905)
>
> The cooler the surface the more UV you absorb and the more heat your mitochondria release to condense the respiratory proteins to control local geometry. This is controlled on a macroscopic level by dopamine and melatonin cycles. Time 9.

I'm shocked how strong I'm seeing the influence in-practice (in comparison to my past). Yes, I have assimilated more UV recently and have been using morning light daily, always blocking blue in the evening. The major factors in-play making temp-changes work amazingly well.

Ok, along with the list of problems that ive been able to solve with light/food/grounding, since like 7 or 10 years ago, (hard to say), i ve been suffering with frequent urination. It got worse when i took Trileptal fro my mild epilepsia. Then it got even worse when i got my Inguinal Hernia surgery. Well the last years i noticed my frequent urination got worse if i ate salt. Sometimes i would wake up 15 times at night for a minimum amunt of pee, feeling i let it all go, but in the next 15 minutes i urged again -.- . ...... The last 2 months its has been really bad, a lot of urinating frequency, but the worst part, i started smelling like pee. Like my sweat, even thoug its mild, it is there!!. I read its called Uridrosis, and its related to poor kidney function . Ive never drinked alcohol, but the thing i believe destroyed my kidneys were the 2 years i drank yerba mate like 1,5 lts per day, i was addicted to it. People told me about the possible kidney overwork but i didnt listen :S.... That in conjuction with the Medicine Trileptal (pill) wich it was a known kidney enemy.... Please, anybody with similar problems?? An idea??? I cant work on my radiation exposure even thoug is very low. I can go harder on controling my light.. i hope that helps. But is there any dietary or lifestyle change i should do???

Mitochondrial DNA is controlled by melatonin cycles so this is why being cold dark and boring is key in the beginning. ### AdrianaDr. Radler-Pohl — 2016-03-16T16:58:05+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-again-im-back-to-this-forum.17683/post-190969>

... Long time no see ... I was on this Forum since 2012 and had a break because I prepared for a naturopathic degree ... so since 2015 I have a naturopathic practice on my own together with my husband, who is a naturopath too. Im a molecular biologist and wanted to work with people my whole life ... but as a scientist you don't do that. You drift more and more away from people you want to help originally. Now Im back and finally I reached this goal ... I had to relearn a lot of things I was trained originally and its so amazing, that Im re-finding things which I started during my studies. As a matter of fact Jens (husband) and I met with Popp during our university studies .... this is crazy ... so now Im back reading and learning ... and its so nice recognizing some of the forum members ....

… Dear Jack ... Listening to the Podcast all I could think of was the Pain I felt realizing that my dad died with 66 Years, and my mum at 77 years because of things I should have known as a molecular biologist ... but as you said - I was not able to connect the dots .... I my consult with you 4 years ago you pointed me into the right direction ... so I did work on those systems and you mentioned my mum and my genetic background ... my mum had vitiligo and a lot of mismatches and died then of an Pankreatic Cancer ... dad had arteriosclerosis and died of an heart attack ... like you I had To really scru things Up by having an autistic child and developing breast cancer... but this made me learn different things ... by beeing fortunate enough to know People like my Professor of cellular biology his name was Prof. Walter Nagl, wo was a very special person knowing People like Popp and thinking very differently about genetics Even in 1978 ... so I think isnt bad to fall down - but it is bad not to get up! ... and now I'm able to work with patients as a therapist in my own practice... so now we are in business !!!

Remember sleep links to UV light by way of aromatic amino acids that make melatonin.

Now for the rest:
Sun light on our gonads/mammary glands is capable of slowing down our peripheral clock gene's in these tissues relative to our SCN, hence lowering our chance of oncogenesis. This is move an optimal human male/female makes. Why? It's a "relative testosterone" booster by indirectly raising our RBC's mass while simultaneously lowering estrogen levels in these tissues. For men this increases testosterone and lowers estrogen in all body parts, but in women it is a boon for the breasts. Too much estrogen unopposed drives mammary gland growth. The porphyrins and hemoglobin allowed the capability of absorbing UV light to fuel the transformation of cholesterol to 7-Dehydrocholesterol to stabilize our epithelial surfaces over over our gonads/mammary glands. 7-Dehydrocholesterol is a semiconducting protein in our skin and epithelial tissues that takes the native EMF solar signal of light (with melanin and sulfated cholesterol and water) and changes it to a chemical signal that the brain samples to control peripheral and central circadian timing in our clock genes. How does this occur?

The photoelectric effect has been extensively studied in plants. It has been found to be massively energy efficient. The rate of energy capture by the photoelectric effect in plants is immense. It is approximately 100 trillion watts (1 trillion watts = 1 terawatt). This is ten times the current the current power consumption of the human species today. It is clear the photoelectric effect is very powerful for plant life that they could evolve just using water, CO2, and light to make nutrients. Animals are not connected into the ground 100% of the time, nor do they have their semiconductors (canopy of leaves) in the sunlight 24/7. So animal life had to come up with a new way to use the photoelectric effect to power its version of life. It did. It used DHA and water to build a powerful battery that was constantly recharged by solar power. Sulfated Vitamin D3 in our skin is a semiconductor LED designed to transfer the sun’s power to our hypothalamus by way of our blood plasma. The blood plasma then distributes the chemical message to our gonads/mammary glands. The brain uses this signal to OPTIMIZE SLEEP. The sun can increase the electric charge present in our plasma and our neuroepithelium simultaneously in this way.

Using real world experiments and the laws of nature that Einstein uncovered and showing you how Vitamin D3 use them as well. I have told you the leptin receptor is the accountant in the brain that measures photons and electrons. The epithelium and brain both come from the same material in an embryo. This tissue is called neuroectoderm. This shows you another quantum principle at play. At one time in all life the skin and brain were connected. Here is another twist you might not know. In the embryo, neuroectoderm receives a light signal from bone morphogenetic protein which absorbs UV light. This is an inhibiting signals from a protein called noggin. Noggin leads to the development of the nervous system from this tissue. Here we see how bone tissue can directs neuroepithelial and brain formation. Robert Becker's life's work established that bone formation was quantum because it used the photoelectric effect by rectifying its current. Now we see bone helps form the brain indirectly. This is how Vitamin D3 is important in both tissues. This implies the brain, gonads, and breast tissue is also quantized. Everything is connected in a quantized system. This is the key principle behind coherence in the living matrix of all biology. The key is realizing the system is quantized to begin with. Are there more connections you should be aware of with the skin? Yes. The integumentary system covers the surface of the embryo and its specialized skin structures including hair, nails, sweat glands, MAMMARY GLANDS and teeth. As a system it has contributions from all embryonic layers. This means that every system at some level is tied to sulfated Vitamin D3 in some way, and it is why the sulfation of Vitamin D3 by the sun is important to understand.

Ladies reading this should stop........and now realize why they need their breasts in the sun for wellness too. A woman's gonads, ovaries, are deep hidden from the sun, but not from the Vitamin D3 signal, but their breasts are out in the open awaiting the sun signal. What happens when women bury the sun from her life? READ THE LINK ENCLOSED.

In our adult form, the skin and our brain are no longer are ‘physically‘ connected. What binds their function together physiologically? Sulfated Vitamin D3 levels is the short answer. # Thread: Ides of March:Four years of CT
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ides-of-march-four-years-of-ct.17689/>
**Subforum:** Success Stories
**Posts:** 9
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### shah78 — 2016-03-17T00:12:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ides-of-march-four-years-of-ct.17689/post-191024>

Four years and nearly 2000 hours in my green tub between 50-55 degrees. Best body composition(despite only thirty minutes of weight lifting/mo)/best erections/ least amount of anxiety/depression of my life, at age 59. No one really believes, it except my wife , and even she "forgets" sometimes.  Went from around 20 % body fat to around 10%bf. Eat about the same, just less hungry. Still don't enjoy the "WINTER" (FLORIDA) , but I find myself wearing shorts /tank tops, when friends and relatives are wearing sweaters. It all seems like science fiction..... Long live Jack Kruse and long live his memory!

### jwhb77 — 2016-03-21T17:35:21+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ides-of-march-four-years-of-ct.17689/post-191253>

Fantastic, shah78, thanks for sharing!

### Hunger4More — 2016-03-22T14:50:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ides-of-march-four-years-of-ct.17689/post-191286>

### shah78 — 2016-03-22T18:10:35+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ides-of-march-four-years-of-ct.17689/post-191299>

i'M SORT OF A WIMP STILL. I admit that I CT more in the summer than the winter. I shoot for three to four half hour sessions a day. then I sun bath. I eat my meals and use the computer, read the newspaper and make phone calls on my land line during the session. In the summer I shoot for twenty hours a week

# Thread: light therapy and psoriasis
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/light-therapy-and-psoriasis.17690/>
**Subforum:** Feedback/Suggestions
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Lin Moore — 2016-03-17T03:06:03+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/light-therapy-and-psoriasis.17690/post-191030>

I just read time #8 regarding psoriasis. Sadly, I was just dx with it this week. So far just small (but very itchy) patches on my elbows and knees. So in a way another warning sign that brought me back to the forum and blog to learn more.

This quote from the blog spoke to me (though there were so many new concepts that my mind is trying to sort it all out still).

"The lack of full spectrum sunlight is the missing piece. It is supposed to shines on the largest organ in the body, which is the skin, and the skin’s thickness is determined by the amount of light that hits it and how effective the underlying circulatory system is in assimilating UV and IR light. These initially photoelectric interactions determines ultimately, how the atomic lattice of the skin interacts or did not interact, with specific frequencies of light we allowed to hit our skin and eye. If you share the same light environment in your family, it begins to makes sense why you might think there is a genetic component. The interesting aspects that links both cancer and psoriasis is how light plays a deep role in both diseases. "

My adoptive mother and my twin are all struggling with similar autoimmune diseases. Sharing same light environment, bingo?!

And, my other question is about the underlying circulatory system in assimilating UV and IR light. Would reynauds and my erythromelalgia ( I refer to myself as sensitive to cold and sun) also be an issue in my development of psoriasis? Sadly I really have avoided the sun the last 10 years due to the development of these issues, and working in the medical field inside, all day.

I also wanted to mention about you discussing those that have metabolic syndrome markers at normal wt. That's me! My last huge panel of blood work that came in. It was like the lab results were for an obese person. I'm an active mom, early 30s and hx of low/normal bmi. Go figure!

Also, I just found a local tanning salon that offers red light therapy and of course traditional types of tanning. What would be my best option at this time since I'm dealing with hashimotos and now psoriasis? My vit d is still 24. Working on consuming high protein breakfast and dha sources daily, and of course am sun.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/dandruff-scurf-related-to-candida.17692/post-205197>

[https://www.facebook.com/drjackkruse/posts/1576961415701540](https://www.facebook.com/drjackkruse/posts/1576961415701540)

### Jack Kruse — 2016-12-13T04:32:09+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/dandruff-scurf-related-to-candida.17692/post-205198>

600 million years ago the Cambrian explosion occured. What happened 600 million years ago was biology's Big bang and technology revolution. Several things changed in the environment. UV light spiked and made the surface skin of the planet's oceans more transparent to sunlight. This had a massive impact on the planet's life forms in the sea and eventually the land. Algae using photosynthesis began to make DHA and oxygen and this allowed the explosion of the marine food chain of seafood. All seafood is high in selenium. Selenium is very reactive with respect to oxygen in water and the air. At the time solar power was raised some other things occured on the surface of Earth. More UV light meant more oxygen would be liberated in the atmosphere from ozone and in the seas photosynthesis was super charged to make both DHA and oxygen at the same time in the seas. This convergence of quantum activity lead to life's Big Bang.

It also lead to how protein incorporated selenium into our proteins. Oxygenation of Earth has occured in step wise fashion over 2.5 billion years. It was not until 600 million years ago that we got to 21% in the air that enable life to use oxygen as the terminal electron acceptor in mitochondria. The reason selenocysteine is handled so differently during eukaryotic protein synthesis can be traced back to the first Great Oxygenation Event covered in Nick Lane's book Oxygen. This was the period about 2.3 billion years ago when free oxygen in Earth's atmosphere suddenly spiked, due to the evolutionary emergence of plants and photosynthesis as a way to derive energy from the sun. Organisms needed to evolve ways to prevent cellular damage caused by oxidation, and selenium, a powerful antioxidant, would have been available in sea water but not used well because of the sun's spectral power increased. That power increased approximately at 600 million years (our sun is a G star) really putting a bottleneck on selenium incorporation into proteins. 2.3 billion years ago there likely was an already-existing processes for incorporating trace elements into proteins under a sun without prominent UV frequencies. As the marine food chain increased and these animals lived in deeper water they were protected from many of the light rays causing photo-oxidation. This is why their flesh is loaded with selenium.

I believe the unusual mechanisms for selenium incorporation where due to where it had to happen..........in sea water and not air. In sea water the optics are different and with selenium being an insulator and not a conductor the normal mechansims for other minerla likely would not have worked for selenium, which is extremely reactive to light. This paper did not go as far as I did here but this is why I think it occurred. Oh and by the way........this is why Selsun Blue shampoo is made for dandruff. What is the Selsun name for? Selenium and sunlight.

Read more at: [http://phys.org/news/2016-10-seleni...s/2016-10-selenium-incorporated-proteins.html](http://phys.org/news/2016-10-selenium-incorporated-proteins.html#jCphttp://phys.org/news/2016-10-selenium-incorporated-proteins.html)

### Jack Kruse — 2016-12-13T04:52:42+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/dandruff-scurf-related-to-candida.17692/post-205199>

Because selenium can convert light into electricity, it is used in solar panels. Your skin is a solar panel. So when your skin closest to the sun doesn't have it, it gets dried out and slough's off and we call it dandruff = dehydration = poor mitochondrial function. People forget mitochondrial function makes CO2 and water as by products of ox/phos. This is why syncope is a sign of heteroplasmy rate. We could even use the tilt table test with sleep deprivation as a crude measuring tool for heteroplasmy rate. Don't laugh because I did that mito-hack years ago and its not fun!!!! The reversal of photosynthesis is not a coincidence of nature. It is a coupled linked system between plants and animals that allowed for complex life because of oxygen and DHA production from the oceans 650 million years ago. It reverses what a chloroplast does in photosynthesis by design. A chloroplast and mitochondria are both symbiont bacteria and these processes reverse one another in nature. Selenium's ability to conduct electricity increases as its exposure to light increases. This improves mitochondrial function because we make more water which increases our wireless solar battery capacitor in our cytoplasm.

### Jack Kruse — 2016-03-17T19:14:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/optimal-kids-begin-without-morning-sickness.17693/post-191087>
